content_body: Gary and family, We'd like to commend your website. In the absence of a personal referral, and in the marketplace with many offerings, your website stood out with its organization and information. We chose your cabin with confidence, and the entire process from reservation through check out has been well managed. The cabin is just as advertised, beautiful, luxurious, and very comfortable. And what can you say about the view - stunning! We've had a great visit. Despite the heat wave we enjoyed horseback riding, whitewater rafting, the train ride, tubing, and shopping. We're already planning a return in cooler weather! Thank you and best wishes.
title: Cabin Rentals of Georgia Summer Vacation
